con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="PredictiveModelCPCGL" targetNamespace="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:tns="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> <xs:import namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson"/> <xs:element name="CalculateFactorCpCgl"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="request" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalculateRequest"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalculateRequest"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CGLPriorRateIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CPPriorRateIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CancellationDate" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimCountbyLine" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClassCodes" nillable="true" type="q1:ArrayOfint" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="County" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ExposurePayroll" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LiabilityLosses" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PersonalBankrupcyCount" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PersonalLienCount" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyCenterTermNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PremOpsHazardCode" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorCarrierTerms" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfPriorCarrierTerm"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorNJMTerms" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfPriorNJMTerm"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ProdCoHazardCode" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PropertyHazardCode" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PropertyLosses" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubLines" nillable="true" type="q2:ArrayOfstring" xmlns:q2="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TermNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalCurrentTermPayrollExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalCurrentTermSalesExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalCurrentTermSquareFootageExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="UWCompany" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalculateRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalculateRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsureds" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfAdditionalInsured"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BatchCounter" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BatchStatus" nillable="true" type="tns:BatchStatus"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegment" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessStartYear" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ChampionRequestDateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ChampionRequestObjId" type="q3:ObjectId" xmlns:q3="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClueReportId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalEntity" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Locations" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfLocation"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NumberOfNOICs" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PaymentPlanType" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PersonalCreditScore" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PredictiveModelPolicyID" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorRateIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTierFactorLiability" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTierFactorProperty" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RequestSource" nillable="true" type="tns:RequestSource"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalReinstatements" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BaseState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimCount" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EffectiveDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ExpirationDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InceptionDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyStatus" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PredictiveModelCriteria" nillable="true" type="tns:ModelCriteria"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ProductName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Source" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubmissionNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="ModelCriteria"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BaseState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ModelId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyStatus" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ProductName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TransactionType" type="tns:TransactionType"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ModelCriteria" nillable="true" type="tns:ModelCriteria"/> <xs:simpleType name="TransactionType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Submission"/> <xs:enumeration value="Renewals"/> <xs:enumeration value="RewriteWithNewTerm"/> <xs:enumeration value="PolicyChange"/> <xs:enumeration value="RewriteRemainderOfTheTerm"/> <xs:enumeration value="Cancellation"/> <xs:enumeration value="Reinstatement"/> <xs:enumeration value="RewriteFullTerm"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="TransactionType" nillable="true" type="tns:TransactionType"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfAdditionalInsured"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="AdditionalInsured" nillable="true" type="tns:AdditionalInsured"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfAdditionalInsured" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfAdditionalInsured"/> <xs:complexType name="AdditionalInsured"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsuredName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsuredNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="AdditionalInsured" nillable="true" type="tns:AdditionalInsured"/> <xs:simpleType name="BatchStatus"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Pending"/> <xs:enumeration value="Failed"/> <xs:enumeration value="Processed"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="BatchStatus" nillable="true" type="tns:BatchStatus"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfLocation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Location" nillable="true" type="tns:Location"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfLocation" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfLocation"/> <xs:complexType name="Location"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address" nillable="true" type="tns:Address"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Buildings" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBuilding"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LocationNumber" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LocationState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PrefillReportId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PropertyID" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Location" nillable="true" type="tns:Location"/> <xs:complexType name="Address"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="City" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="County" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="State" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Zip" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Address" nillable="true" type="tns:Address"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfBuilding"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Building" nillable="true" type="tns:Building"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfBuilding" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBuilding"/> <xs:complexType name="Building"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingLimit" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessPersonalPropertyLimit" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NoofStories" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SquareFootage" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearBuilt" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastElectricalUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastHVACUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastPlumbingUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastRoofingUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Building" nillable="true" type="tns:Building"/> <xs:simpleType name="RequestSource"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="PC"/> <xs:enumeration value="Batch"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="RequestSource" nillable="true" type="tns:RequestSource"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfPriorCarrierTerm"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="PriorCarrierTerm" nillable="true" type="tns:PriorCarrierTerm"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfPriorCarrierTerm" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfPriorCarrierTerm"/> <xs:complexType name="PriorCarrierTerm"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EffectiveDate" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ExpirationDate" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NumberOfClaims" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermBPPExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermBuildingExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermPayrollExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermSalesExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermSquareFootageExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TermNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PriorCarrierTerm" nillable="true" type="tns:PriorCarrierTerm"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfPriorNJMTerm"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="PriorNJMTerm" nillable="true" type="tns:PriorNJMTerm"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfPriorNJMTerm" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfPriorNJMTerm"/> <xs:complexType name="PriorNJMTerm"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CancellationDate" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EffectiveDate" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ExpirationDate" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NumberOfClaims" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermBPPExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermBuildingExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermPayrollExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermSalesExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTermSquareFootageExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TermNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PriorNJMTerm" nillable="true" type="tns:PriorNJMTerm"/> <xs:element name="CalculateFactorCpCglResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CalculateFactorCpCglResult" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelTierFactorResponse"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CGLResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalculateResponse"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CPResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalculateResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelTierFactorResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelTierFactorResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BaseResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:BaseResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"/> <xs:complexType name="ErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" type="tns:ErrorType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ErrorInfo" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> <xs:simpleType name="ErrorType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="None"/> <xs:enumeration value="Validation"/> <xs:enumeration value="ServiceError"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="ErrorType" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorType"/> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalculateResponse"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CorelationId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ModelCriteria" nillable="true" type="tns:ModelCriteria"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" minOccurs="0" name="ScheduleModRecommendationFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ScheduleModRecommendationTier" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ScheduleModRecommendationTierBILevel" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalculateResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalculateResponse"/> <xs:element name="GetCGLRawReportData"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="request" nillable="true" type="tns:RawReportSearchCriteria"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="RawReportSearchCriteria"> <xs:sequence> type="tns:CGLRawReportViewModel"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="CGLRawReportViewModel"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountBillingFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountBillingFactorBILevel" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountBillingValue" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountComplexityFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountComplexityFactorBILevel" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountComplexityValue" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> minOccurs="0" name="BankruptcyIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BaseState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingExposureRenewingTerm" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegment" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegmentFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegmentFactorBILevel" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegmentOrHazardGrade" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimsFrequency" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimsFrequencyFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimsFrequencyFactorBILevel" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CommercialCreditScore" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CommercialCreditScoreBILevel" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CommercialCreditScoreFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CompanionClaimFactorRetention" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CountyState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CurrentTermPayrollExposure" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalEntityGroup" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LienFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LienFactorBILevel" con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soap12:Envelope xmlns:soap12="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <s:Header xmlns:s="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope"> <To s:mustUnderstand="1" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/05/addressing/none">http://dotnetq3wt2.njmgroup.com/CPCGLPredictiveModel/PredictiveModelCPCGL.svc</To> <Action s:mustUnderstand="1" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/05/addressing/none">PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelCPCGL/CalculateFactorCpCgl</Action> </s:Header> <soap12:Body> <tns:CalculateFactorCpCgl xmlns:tns="PredictiveModelService.Entities"> <tns:request> <tns:AccountNumber>AA427016201</tns:AccountNumber> <tns:BaseState>NJ</tns:BaseState> <tns:EffectiveDate>2023-05-02T00:01:00-04:00</tns:EffectiveDate> <tns:ExpirationDate>2024-05-02T00:01:00-04:00</tns:ExpirationDate> <tns:InceptionDate>2022-01-01T00:00:00-05:00</tns:InceptionDate> <tns:PolicyNumber>1404450132</tns:PolicyNumber> <tns:PolicyStatus>Draft</tns:PolicyStatus> <tns:PredictiveModelCriteria> <tns:BaseState>NJ</tns:BaseState> <tns:ModelId>0</tns:ModelId> <tns:TransactionType>Renewals</tns:TransactionType> </tns:PredictiveModelCriteria> <tns:ProductName>CommercialPackagePolicy</tns:ProductName> <tns:Source>PC</tns:Source> <tns:SubmissionNumber>QQ472787204</tns:SubmissionNumber> <tns:AdditionalInsureds /> <tns:BusinessSegment>PS - Professional Services</tns:BusinessSegment> <tns:BusinessStartYear>1998</tns:BusinessStartYear> <tns:LegalEntity>Association</tns:LegalEntity> <tns:Locations> <tns:Location> <tns:Address> <tns:County>Bergen</tns:County> <tns:Zip>07853</tns:Zip> </tns:Address> <tns:Buildings /> <tns:LocationNumber>1</tns:LocationNumber> <tns:LocationState>NJ</tns:LocationState> <tns:PrefillReportId>999999999999</tns:PrefillReportId> <tns:PropertyID>817984</tns:PropertyID> </tns:Location> </tns:Locations> <tns:PaymentPlanType>Eleven Payments - CPP</tns:PaymentPlanType> <tns:ClassCodes> <tns:int xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">10015</tns:int> </tns:ClassCodes> <tns:PremOpsHazardCode>5</tns:PremOpsHazardCode> <tns:PriorCarrierTerms /> <tns:SubLines> <tns:string xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">CGL</tns:string> <tns:string xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays" /> </tns:SubLines> <tns:TermNumber>2</tns:TermNumber> <tns:TotalCurrentTermPayrollExposure>0</tns:TotalCurrentTermPayrollExposure> <tns:TotalCurrentTermSalesExposure>100</tns:TotalCurrentTermSalesExposure> <tns:TotalCurrentTermSquareFootageExposure>0</tns:TotalCurrentTermSquareFootageExposure> <tns:UWCompany>NJM</tns:UWCompany> </tns:request> </tns:CalculateFactorCpCgl> </soap12:Body> </soap12:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:pred="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:mon="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson" <pred:AdditionalInsureds>\r <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->\r <pred:AdditionalInsured>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <pred:AdditionalInsuredName>?</pred:AdditionalInsuredName>\r <!--Optional:-->\r
